confirm.title: Approval required: {{tool}}
confirm.descriptionEdit: The agent wants to modify a file. Review the request below and decide whether to proceed.
confirm.descriptionTool: The agent wants to run this tool. Review the request below and decide whether to proceed.
confirm.trustSuggestionHint: Picking Always will whitelist matching calls for this project.
confirm.yoloDestructiveNote: YOLO is on. This prompt is still shown because the request was classified as destructive.
confirm.skipApprovalsHint: Enable YOLO mode and the agent runs without asking. Destructive operations still prompt.
confirm.enableYoloTitle: Enable YOLO mode (auto-approve this and future non-destructive calls)
confirm.denyAlwaysTitle: Reject this and all future calls matching the pattern (d)
confirm.alwaysTitle: Approve and remember the pattern for the project (a)
